description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and a mix of light and dark exterior finishes. The front facade includes a recessed entryway, a small porch area, and landscaped greenery with a tree and shrubs. Large windows are present on both levels, providing ample natural light, while the rear of the house has a more enclosed appearance with minimal window openings. The side elevations are mostly solid, with one side featuring a small door and the other side showing a few windows and a balcony. The roof includes a central skylight or open courtyard area, adding to the contemporary feel. The overall structure is compact, with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a mix of dark and light finishes, large windows, and landscaped front yard. The design is boxy and minimalist, featuring a recessed entry and a central skylight.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, a small porch, landscaped yard with a tree, and large windows.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals a mostly solid wall with a single door and a glimpse of the central skylight or courtyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a mostly enclosed facade with minimal windows and a large wooden garage or gate.
description_view_3: Right side view highlights a few windows, a balcony, and the landscaped front yard extending along the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows on the front and minimal windows on the sides and rear
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a small porch, steps, and landscaped elements; modern door with glass panels
